info.name: AIAS API
info.description:
Adaptive Intelligent Auditing System — Multi-tenant Laravel 13 API.

Two routing contexts:
  Central domain (localhost:8020) — prefix /api/v1 — super-admin auth + tenant management
  Tenant domain ({tenant_id}.localhost:8020) — prefix /v1 — tenant user auth + operations

Quick start:
  1. Super Admin Auth / Login  →  sa_token auto-saved
  2. Tenant Management / Create Tenant  →  tenant_id auto-saved
  3. Tenant Auth / Register or Login  →  tenant_token auto-saved

Response envelope (success):
  { "data": {...}, "meta": { "request_id": "...", "version": "v1", "tenant": null } }

Response envelope (error):
  { "error": { "code": "...", "message": "...", "details": null }, "meta": {...} }

variable.description: Central domain base URL. Handles super-admin auth and tenant management.
Tenant domain base URL. Resolved from tenant_id variable.
Active tenant ID. Auto-set by Create Tenant response.
Continent identifier. Auto-set by Create/List Continents.
Country identifier. Auto-set by Create/List Countries.
Preamble identifier. Auto-set by Create/List Preambles.
Super-admin Bearer token. Auto-set by SA Login.
Tenant user Bearer token. Auto-set by Tenant Login/Register.

item.name: Central — Health
item.description: Health check on the central domain. No authentication required.

request.description: Public endpoint. Returns { status: ok } with full meta block including request_id and version.

item.name: Central — Super Admin Auth
item.description: Super-admin authentication on the central domain. Login auto-saves sa_token to collection variables. All subsequent super-admin requests inherit the collection-level Bearer auth.

request.description:
Public endpoint. Throttled: 10 requests/minute.

Returns Bearer token + user object. Token is auto-saved to sa_token collection variable.

Error responses:
  401 — Invalid credentials
  403 — Account disabled
  422 — Validation failed

Requires sa_token (Bearer — inherited from collection).

Returns authenticated super-admin profile including is_active flag.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated

Requires sa_token (Bearer — inherited from collection).

Revokes the Passport access token and clears sa_token collection variable.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated

item.name: Central — Tenant Management
item.description:
Tenant CRUD on the central domain. All endpoints require super-admin Bearer token (sa_token).

Create Tenant auto-saves tenant_id for use in tenant-domain requests.

exec: console.log('tenant_id set to first result: ' + t.id);

request.description:
Requires sa_token.

Returns all tenants with their associated domains. Sets tenant_id to the first result.

exec: console.log('Tenant DB provisioning triggered in background.');

request.description:
Requires sa_token.

Creates a new tenant and provisions a dedicated database. The domain field is optional — if provided, it must be unique.

Field rules:
  id     — nullable, lowercase alphanumeric/hyphens/underscores, auto-generated from name if omitted
  name   — required, max 255
  plan   — nullable, one of: starter | professional | enterprise (default: starter)
  domain — nullable, must be unique across all tenants

Triggers TenantCreated event → DB create → migrations → seeder in background.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  422 — Validation failed (duplicate id/domain, invalid format)

Requires sa_token.

Fetches a single tenant by ID including its domains array.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  404 — Tenant not found

exec: console.log('Tenant deleted. TenantDeleted event fires DB drop in background.');

request.description:
Requires sa_token.

Soft-deletes the tenant record. Triggers TenantDeleted event which drops the tenant database in the background.

WARNING: This action drops all tenant data.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  404 — Tenant not found

item.name: Central — Continents
item.description:
Central continent management endpoints (super-admin only).

All endpoints require super-admin Bearer token (sa_token).

Create Continent auto-saves continent_identifier for subsequent requests.

exec: console.log('continent_identifier set to first result: ' + c.identifier);

request.description:
Requires sa_token.

Returns paginated list of continents. Supports filters: search, status, sort_by, sort_order.

Sets continent_identifier to the first result.

Requires sa_token.

Creates a new continent.

Field rules:
  name       — required, max 255, unique
  slug       — nullable, max 255 (auto-generated from name if omitted)
  short_code — nullable, max 10
  iso_code   — nullable, max 10
  status     — nullable, boolean (default: true)

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  422 — Validation failed (duplicate name)

Requires sa_token.

Fetches a single continent by identifier.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  404 — Continent not found

Requires sa_token.

Updates an existing continent. All fields are optional (partial update).

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  404 — Continent not found
  422 — Validation failed (duplicate name)

Requires sa_token.

Soft-deletes the continent.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  404 — Continent not found

Requires sa_token.

Restores a previously soft-deleted continent.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  404 — Continent not found in trash

item.name: Central — Countries
item.description:
Central country management endpoints (super-admin only).

All endpoints require super-admin Bearer token (sa_token).

Create Country auto-saves country_identifier for subsequent requests.
Countries belong to continents — continent_id required on create.

exec: console.log('country_identifier set to first result: ' + c.identifier);

request.description:
Requires sa_token.

Returns paginated list of countries. Supports filters: search, status, continent_identifier, sort_by, sort_order.

Sets country_identifier to the first result.

Requires sa_token.

Creates a new country linked to a continent.

Field rules:
  name          — required, max 255, unique
  continent_id  — required, must exist in continents table
  slug          — nullable, max 255 (auto-generated from name if omitted)
  short_code    — nullable, max 10
  iso_code      — nullable, max 10
  currency      — nullable, max 5 (e.g. KES, USD)
  currency_name — nullable, max 50
  currency_sign — nullable, max 5 (e.g. KSh, $)
  country_code  — nullable, max 10 (e.g. +254)
  phone_digits  — nullable, integer, 1–15
  status        — nullable, boolean (default: true)

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  422 — Validation failed (duplicate name, invalid continent_id)

Requires sa_token.

Fetches a single country by identifier including its continent relation.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  404 — Country not found

Requires sa_token.

Updates an existing country. All fields are optional (partial update).

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  404 — Country not found
  422 — Validation failed (duplicate name, invalid continent_id)

Requires sa_token.

Soft-deletes the country.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  404 — Country not found

Requires sa_token.

Restores a previously soft-deleted country.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  404 — Country not found in trash

item.name: Tenant — Health
item.description:
Health check on the tenant domain. Confirms tenant resolution is working.

NOTE: Requests go to {{tenant_base_url}} = http://{{tenant_id}}.localhost:8020/v1
Ensure {{tenant_id}} is set (use Create Tenant or List Tenants first).

request.description:
Public endpoint on the tenant domain.

Confirms that Stancl tenancy resolves the correct tenant from the Host header. Returns the resolved tenant ID.

Prerequisite: tenant_id collection variable must be set and the tenant must exist in the database.

item.name: Tenant — Auth
item.description:
Tenant-domain user authentication. Requests go to http://{{tenant_id}}.localhost:8020/v1.

This folder uses {{tenant_token}} Bearer auth (not sa_token).
Register and Login auto-save tenant_token to collection variables.

request.description:
Public endpoint on the tenant domain.

Creates a new user scoped to the resolved tenant. Returns Bearer token.

Field rules:
  first_name — required, max 100
  last_name  — required, max 100
  email      — required, valid email, unique within the tenant
  password   — required, min 8 chars
  password_confirmation — required, must match password

Error responses:
  422 — Validation failed (duplicate email, password mismatch, etc.)

Public endpoint on the tenant domain. Throttled: 10 requests/minute.

Authenticates a tenant user scoped to the resolved tenant. Returns Bearer token.

Error responses:
  401 — Invalid credentials
  403 — Account disabled
  422 — Validation failed

Requires tenant_token (Bearer — inherited from folder).

Also validates that the token belongs to this tenant (EnsureTokenMatchesTenant middleware).

The meta.tenant field confirms the resolved tenant context.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  403 — Token belongs to a different tenant (TENANT_MISMATCH)

Requires tenant_token (Bearer — inherited from folder).

Revokes the Passport access token and clears tenant_token collection variable.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  403 — Token belongs to a different tenant

item.name: Tenant — Preambles
item.description:
Tenant-scoped preamble management endpoints.

Requires tenant_token (Bearer auth) and valid tenant resolution via {{tenant_base_url}}.

Create Preamble auto-saves preamble_identifier for subsequent requests.

exec: console.log('preamble_identifier set to first result: ' + p.identifier);

request.description:
Requires tenant_token.

Returns paginated list of preambles for the resolved tenant. Supports filters: search, status, sort_by, sort_order.

Sets preamble_identifier to the first result.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Quality Policy Statement",
  "description": "This preamble establishes the quality management policy for the organization.",
  "status": "draft",
  "effective_date": "2026-06-01",
  "is_featured": false
}

request.description:
Requires tenant_token.

Creates a new preamble scoped to the resolved tenant.

Field rules:
  name           — required, max 255
  description    — nullable, text
  status         — nullable, one of the allowed statuses (e.g. draft, active, archived)
  effective_date — nullable, valid date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  is_featured    — nullable, boolean

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  403 — Token belongs to a different tenant
  422 — Validation failed

Requires tenant_token.

Fetches a single preamble by identifier.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  403 — Token belongs to a different tenant
  404 — Preamble not found

Requires tenant_token.

Updates an existing preamble. All fields are optional (partial update).

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  403 — Token belongs to a different tenant
  404 — Preamble not found
  422 — Validation failed

Requires tenant_token.

Soft-deletes the preamble.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  403 — Token belongs to a different tenant
  404 — Preamble not found

Requires tenant_token.

Restores a previously soft-deleted preamble.

Error responses:
  401 — Unauthenticated
  403 — Token belongs to a different tenant
  404 — Preamble not found in trash
